title: sub_GAME_7F03ECC0 hull clamp drops real corners on the collision path (Dam monitors floor-snap); unclamp the collision_data-backed path
repro: GE007_TRACE_HULL_DEGEN=1 boot of Dam: 40 objects emit degenerate footprints, of which 31 are SPURIOUS (the clamp defect) and 9 are INHERENT (collinear panels, unfixable by design). ctest hull_builder is GREEN by default (unclamped, retail-faithful) and RED under HULL_TEST_CLAMP=1 (pre-fix clamp behavior). The monitor floor-snap is reproducible end-to-end via the registered tools/rom_oracle_routes/dam_monitor_probe_visual.json capture route (pad 100, game_timer 1190); at the time of root-causing, pre-fix warp-pad measurement showed 3 monitors at -618.71 (floor) and 1 at -525.31 (desk) -- recorded fact, not a currently-committed flag.

evidence.path: src/game/chrprop_hull_impl.inc: retail 0x7F03ECC0 stores the true hull vertex count (up to 8, geometrically <=6 for a box) with NO clamp, writing overflow verts into the collision_data words after the 4-vertex rect4f (rect==&data->unk04). FID-0096 added an unconditional clamp-to-4 for tank-path memory safety, but that also clamps the object/door collision path, DROPPING real hull corners for thin/near-axis-aligned box footprints: chrpropTestPointInPolygon then tests a triangle/duplicated-corner sliver, so sub_GAME_7F03FAB0 desk detection fails and objInit floor-snaps props. Root symptom: 3 of 4 Dam security-hut monitors (setup pads 88/91/97) grounded at floor y=-618.71 instead of desk y=-525.31.

src/game/chrprop_hull_impl.inc: GE007_TRACE_HULL_DEGEN Dam census 31->0 spurious hulls (40 degenerate total pre-fix, 9 inherent/collinear and unfixable by design; 116->0 spurious across dam/facility/archives/streets); registered dam_monitor_probe_visual route (tools/rom_oracle_routes/dam_monitor_probe_visual.json, committed ceeb8b8) pad 100 warp-pad measurement pre 3@-618.71+1@-525.31, post 0@-618.71+4@-525.31 (WebGPU and GL identical).

tests/test_hull_builder.c: corpus ctest hull_builder GREEN (unclamped) / RED under HULL_TEST_CLAMP=1 (pre-fix clamp fails the real Dam desk box: 4->3 corners, dropped corner outside). Refactor byte-identical (full HULL_DEGEN log diff clean).

history.evidence: src/game/chrprop_hull_impl.inc: retail 0x7F03ECC0 stores the true hull vertex count (up to 8, geometrically <=6 for a box) with NO clamp, writing overflow verts into the collision_data words after the 4-vertex rect4f (rect==&data->unk04). FID-0096 added an unconditional clamp-to-4 for tank-path memory safety, but that also clamps the object/door collision path, DROPPING real hull corners for thin/near-axis-aligned box footprints: chrpropTestPointInPolygon then tests a triangle/duplicated-corner sliver, so sub_GAME_7F03FAB0 desk detection fails and objInit floor-snaps props. history.note: Task 1b: refutes the DAM_PARITY 4.7 'CRT body never draws / opcode-0x12' render hypothesis; real cause is this collision-hull clamp. Supersedes the deferred FID-0096 faithful-mode decision for the collision path.

history.evidence: src/game/chrprop_hull_impl.inc: GE007_TRACE_HULL_DEGEN Dam census 31->0 spurious hulls (40 degenerate total pre-fix, 9 inherent/collinear and unfixable by design; 116->0 spurious across dam/facility/archives/streets); registered dam_monitor_probe_visual route (tools/rom_oracle_routes/dam_monitor_probe_visual.json, committed ceeb8b8) pad 100 warp-pad measurement pre 3@-618.71+1@-525.31, post 0@-618.71+4@-525.31 (WebGPU and GL identical).
history.note: Mechanism: thin/near-axis-aligned box -> 2 distinct extreme picks -> emit collapses to <4 distinct after clamp; point-in-poly tests a triangle. Fix scoped to collision_data-backed path (rect==&data->unk04); tank path stays clamped.
Extracted geometry to a shared .inc; caller passes retail_unclamped for the collision path.

history.evidence: tests/test_hull_builder.c: corpus ctest hull_builder GREEN (unclamped) / RED under HULL_TEST_CLAMP=1 (pre-fix clamp fails the real Dam desk box: 4->3 corners, dropped corner outside). Refactor byte-identical (full HULL_DEGEN log diff clean).
